name: Teleporter
description: A trigger volume that teleports the player to a target location when entered. Shows enter/arrival messages. Uses SetActorLocation on the overlapping actor.
blueprint_dsl:
BLUEPRINT: {{blueprint_name|BP_Teleporter}}
PARENT: Actor

GRAPH: EventGraph

NODE n1: Event_ActorBeginOverlap
NODE n2: PrintString [InString="{{enter_message|Teleporting...}}"]
NODE n3: MakeVector [X={{dest_x|0}}, Y={{dest_y|0}}, Z={{dest_z|500}}]
NODE n4: SetActorLocation [Sweep=false, Teleport=true]
NODE n5: PrintString [InString="{{arrive_message|Arrived!}}"]

EXEC n1.Then -> n2.Execute
EXEC n2.Then -> n4.Execute
EXEC n4.Then -> n5.Execute

DATA n1.OtherActor -> n4.Target [Actor]
DATA n3.ReturnValue -> n4.NewLocation [Vector]

example_spawn.notes: Place on ground. Set dest_x/dest_y/dest_z to target location.
